2002.reason: [When encountering a single '&', it should not create an AND token with "&&" literal. It should either create a token with "&" literal or handle it as an error without creating a valid token. The current code incorrectly creates an AND token with wrong literal "&&" instead of the actual single "&" character.]

2013.reason: [When encountering a single '|', it should not create an OR token with "&&" literal. This is clearly a copy-paste error where "&&" was not changed to "|". It should create a token with "|" literal or handle it as an error without creating a valid token.]
